author: 2807305869-maker
claim: Import cycle between plan_reconcile.py and workflow.py
reasoning: The claim is factually incorrect. plan_reconcile.py imports ScanRuntime from workflow.py only under TYPE_CHECKING (line 9), which is the standard Python pattern to avoid circular imports. workflow.py imports reconcile_plan_post_scan from plan_reconcile.py at runtime (line 37-39). There is no actual runtime import cycle. The TYPE_CHECKING guard ensures the import only runs during static analysis (mypy), never at runtime.
